title: Product Ops Executive / Project Admin
description:
Role Overview:
We are seeking a highly organized Product Operations Specialist to support our hardware product team throughout the product lifecycle. This role focuses on streamlining operations, managing processes, and ensuring smooth coordination between product, marketing, finance, and other cross-functional teams. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, process-driven, and adept at handling manual workflows and operational documentation.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Collaborate closely with product managers, marketing, finance, and sales teams to support hardware product lifecycles.

  • Manage and optimize product operations workflows, SOPs, forms, and tools to improve team efficiency.

  • Track and report key product metrics, project timelines, milestones, and operational KPIs.

  • Facilitate cross-functional meetings, ensuring clear documentation and timely follow-up actions.

  • Support product launches by coordinating tasks across multiple teams and departments.

  • Identify process bottlenecks and implement improvements to enhance productivity.

  • Maintain accurate product documentation, user guides, and communication channels with stakeholders.

  • Provide data-driven insights to support product strategy and decision-making.

Requirements:

  • 3+ years of experience in product operations, product management, or similar roles.

  • Strong organizational, communication, and interpersonal skills.

  • Experience managing manual processes, SOPs, and forms in a product environment.

  • Proficiency with product management, project tracking tools, and preferably Power BI.

  • Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and produce actionable insights.

  • Proven ability to coordinate cross-functional teams and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

  • Detail-oriented, process-driven, and capable of thriving in a fast-paced environment.

  • Strong problem-solving skills and proactive approach to operational challenges.

Nice to Have:

  • Prior experience in hardware product operations.

  • Familiarity with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI) for operational reporting.


    Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd 
    EA License No: 11C5502
    EAP No. R23111942
    EAP Name: Renee Feng Ye

postedCompany.description:
As a global professional services recruitment consultancy, Morgan McKinley connects specialist talent with leading employers across multiple industries and disciplines.


Our promise to you

You can get the best advice for your career at Morgan McKinley. Our team of consultants have either have an educational background in their sector or have industry experience. We take the time to listen to your long term goals and provide you with honest feedback to help you realise them.

Over the years many people have progressed their careers with us both here in Singapore and internationally and our global presence gives us insight into the domestic and international  markets. In Singapore we specialise in Banking & Financial Services, Legal, Compliance & Audit, Finance & Accounting, IT, Project Management, Sales & Marketing, HR and Supply Chain & Procurement.
postedCompany.name: MORGAN MCKINLEY PTE. LTD.
